code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if in_num
      nums = list.push(nums, sign * val)
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  nums = list.push(nums, sign * val)
end

mut prefix: List<Int> = []
mut acc = 0
for x in nums
  acc = acc + x
  prefix = list.push(prefix, acc)
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = prefix.len()
while j < m
  let v = match prefix.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
